headline: Asset Managers' May AUM Climbs: TROW, LAZ, BEN & IVZ in Focus
summary: BEN, TROW, LAZ and IVZ see May AUM rise on market gains, ETF demand and steady inflows across retirement and long-term strategies.

headline: SHLD vs. PPA: Which Defense ETF Wins the Global Rearmament Trade?
summary: Defense ETFs have multiplied as the global rearmament cycle has matured, and two of the most-followed products take very different routes to the same theme. The Global X Defense Tech ETF (NASDAQ:SHLD) and the Invesco Aerospace & Defense ETF (NYSEARCA:PPA) both promise exposure to rising military budgets, but they define the trade in incompatible ways. ... SHLD vs. PPA: Which Defense ETF Wins the Global Rearmament Trade?

headline: HSBC Close to Picking Buyer for Singapore Insurance Business
summary: HSBC is nearing a decision on its Singapore insurance unit, with Allianz leading talks for a deal that could value the business at up to $2 billion.

raw.headline: HSBC Close to Picking Buyer for Singapore Insurance Business
